descriptions: National Thowheeth Jama'ath was allied with ISIS–K from 2016 to May 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... National Thowheeth Jama'ath (2016 – May 2019)

'Ndrina Vrenna.description: The 'Ndrina Vrenna is a mafia clan ('ndrina) based in Crotone, Italy, founded by Luigi Vrenna. It was involved in a violent feud in the 1970s and later engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and arms offenses. The clan declined after arrests in the 1970s and faced further crackdowns in the 2000s.

descriptions: Members of Vrenna and Bonaventura moved away and closer to Megna.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti delle cosche Vrenna e Bonaventura ... si sono allontanati e avvicinati ai Megna

descriptions: Megna is listed alongside the Vrenna group in an operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura e Megna

descriptions: Vrenna and Bonaventura are co-affiliates in criminal operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 8 aprile 2008 con l'operazione Heracles vengono arrestate 39 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Vrenna, Bonaventura e Corigliano

descriptions: After a bloody feud, Vrenna formed a strong alliance with Ciampà.
edges.evidence_quote: In seguito a una cruente faida i Vrenna hanno stretto una forte alleanza con un'altra famiglia crotonese: la potente famiglia Ciampà.

descriptions: Vrenna, Ciampà, Corigliano, and Bonaventura are grouped together as a single entity.
edges.evidence_quote: Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura

descriptions: Vrenna, Ciampà, Corigliano, and Bonaventura are grouped together as a single entity.
edges.evidence_quote: Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura

descriptions: Vrenna is connected with Iona as part of the Crotone families.
edges.evidence_quote: È collegata con tutte le famiglie del crotonese come i Megna , gli Iona e i Grande Aracri .

descriptions: Vrenna and Megna are targeted together in the same police operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 febbraio 2021: operazione Orso contro i Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura e i Megna .

descriptions: Vrenna and Feudale were in conflict in the Crotone feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Crotone : scoppia nel 1973 tra la famiglia di Luigi Vrenna detto U Zirru e i Feudale.

descriptions: Bloque Cacique Nutibara fought and subdued Bloque Metro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sus más de 1000 integrantes fueron combatidos y luego sometidos por el Bloque Cacique Nutibara al mando de Don Berna.

descriptions: Members of Bloque Metro joined BCN in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Parte de los integrantes del Bloque Metro de las AUC, terminó en las filas del BCN, iniciando el año 2003.

descriptions: Surviving members of Bloque Metro demobilized with Bloque Cacique Nutibara or later with other blocs.
edges.evidence_quote: Los miembros sobrevivientes del Bloque Metro que no se desmovilizaron con el Bloque Cacique Nutibara lo hicieron luego con el Bloque Central Bolívar o el Bloque Héroes de Granada.

descriptions: Albanese, together with Raso and Gullace, clashed with Monteleone in the 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta a Cittanova insieme ai Raso e ai Gullace si sono scontrati con i Facchineri , i Marvaso e i Monteleone.

descriptions: Facchineri-Varone were allied with Monteleone in the 1960s faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta scoppia la prima faida fra i Facchineri-Varone(alleati ai Marvaso e Monteleone) e i Raso, gli Albanese , i Gullace e i De Raco.

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf recruited members from MNLF.
edges.evidence_quote: Abdurajak Abubakar Janjalani's first recruits were soldiers of the MNLF and the Moro Islamic Liberation Front (MILF).

descriptions: JI considers MNLF an opponent according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: State opponents United Nations, Malaysia, Indonesia, Non-state opponents Moro National Liberation Front, Moro Islamic Liberation Front, Free Papua Movement, Free Aceh Movement (until 2005), Abu Sayyaf (until 2024)

descriptions: Infobox lists Tupamaro as an ally of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (2014–2026) Tupamaro , FARC-EP

descriptions: Tupamaro movement supports and expresses solidarity with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN has received support from the Tupamaro movement in Venezuela, a Venezuelan colectivo and political party. The Tupamaro movement supported the ELN's dialogue with the Colombian government, stating, 'The Tupamaro Revolutionary Movement, now more than ever, stands in solidarity with this sister organization in the historic struggle against the neo-Granadian oligarchy and Yankee imperialism. We strongly ratify all of our support for the guerrillas and the ELN High Command, in the process that is developed with the participation of the Colombian people in the resolution of the armed conflict and the construction of peace with social justice'.

descriptions: Carder Planet succeeded Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: counterfeitlibrary.com ... would be followed up by carderplanet.com owned by Dmitry Golubov

descriptions: Hells Angels absorbed RMB biker gang.
edges.evidence_quote: On 18 April 1999, the Hells Angels absorbed the RMB ('Raving Mad Brothers') biker gang in Gagny

descriptions: EMC is a dissident faction of FARC that rejects the peace deal.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2024 the government announced an end to a ceasefire with the smaller dissident FARC faction the Estado Mayor Central, EMC, who reject the 2016 peace deal.

Boyd Gang.description: The Boyd Gang was a Canadian criminal gang based in Toronto, Ontario, active in the late 1940s and early 1950s. Named after member Edwin Alonzo Boyd, the gang committed a series of bank robberies and jail breaks, gaining notoriety in the media. The gang was involved in the fatal shooting of a police detective in 1952. All members were eventually captured and the gang dissolved.

descriptions: Satan's Choice warned Golden Hawk Riders not to join the Outlaws, leading to a confrontation.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of Satan' Choice warned the Golden Hawk Riders, including their sergeant-at-arms, Bill "Heavy" Matiyek, who had a reputation as a hothead, not to go through with the planned "patch over"

descriptions: Golden Hawk Riders and Satan's Choice fought together against a musician in 1966.
edges.evidence_quote: Police say about 12 members of the Golden Hawk Riders and Satan's Choice were out to get even with a musician after he fought with a Golden Hawk Friday and kicked over his motorcycle.

descriptions: Jaysh Ayman is a Kenya-based affiliate unit of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: then with a unit established in 2013 known as Jaysh Ayman

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf fought alongside the Maute Group in the Battle of Marawi.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2017, Hapilon and other members of Abu Sayyaf joined the Islamic extremist Maute Group based in Lanao del Sur during their attempt to seize control of Marawi City.

descriptions: ISPP emerged from Maute Group.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: The Genna crime family is listed as an ally of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Genna crime family

descriptions: Genna crime family were allies of Chicago Outfit.
edges.evidence_quote: allies of Chicago Outfit

descriptions: North Side Gang had Genna crime family as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Chicago Outfit and Genna crime family

descriptions: Morello and Lupo were allies and united through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: One of Giuseppe Morello's strongest allies was Ignazio "the Wolf" Lupo, a mobster who controlled Manhattan's Little Italy. In 1903, Lupo married Morello's half-sister, uniting both organizations.

'Ndrina Loielo.description: The Loielo 'ndrina is a Mafia clan from Ariola, a hamlet of Gerocarne, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italy. It is part of the 'Ndrangheta and has been involved in extortion and drug trafficking. The clan rose to power in the 1970s and dominated the Preserre vibonesi area for over twenty years, engaging in a decade-long feud with the Maiolo family in the 1990s. Its leadership was decimated by arrests and internal conflicts, and by the 2010s it was largely dismantled by law enforcement operations.

descriptions: Gallace sided with Loielo in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: dall'altra Nazzareno Salvatore Emanuele, legato alla 'ndrina dei Loielo, per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Loielo bosses were killed in 2002 due to conflicts with the Emanuele family.
edges.evidence_quote: contrasti con gli Emanuele

descriptions: A feud (faida) broke out in 1989 between Loielo and Maiolo over territorial control, lasting ten years.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1989 scoppia la faida con i Maiolo, per il controllo del territorio, che dura dieci anni

descriptions: Loielo and Maiolo were allies until the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati con la famiglia 'ndranghetista dei Maiolo fino alla fine degli anni '80

descriptions: The Loielo 'ndrina is part of the Locale di 'Ndrangheta dell'Ariola.
edges.evidence_quote: I Loielo sono una 'ndrina di Ariola ... appartenenti al Locale di 'Ndrangheta dell'Ariola

Autodefensas Campesinas de Casanare.description: Colombian regional paramilitary group founded in 1979 by Héctor José Buitrago Rodríguez. Initially engaged in land dispossession, drug trafficking, and extortion, later also using oil royalties and land holdings for financing. After Buitrago's capture in 1997, his son 'Martín Llanos' took control. The group fought a war with the AUC-affiliated Bloque Centauros and is still active.

descriptions: ACC refused to join AUC, considering it a drug trafficking project.
edges.evidence_quote: Las ACC no entraron a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia, una especie de grupo federado que buscó avalar a todos los grupos paramilitares del país creada por los hermanos Castaño en 1997, pues consideraban que era un proyecto del narcotráfico.

descriptions: ACC fought a bloody war with Bloque Centauros for control of Casanare.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre 2003 y 2004 se desató de manera muy cruenta el conflicto entre las ACC con el Bloque Centauros de Arroyave por el control del departamento de Casanare.

descriptions: Bloque Vencedores de Arauca supported Miguel Arroyave against ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: Algunas versiones apuntan a asegurar que el Bloque Vencedores de Arauca (otro aliado de las AUC) llegó por el norte para apoyar a las tropas de Miguel Arroyave

descriptions: ACC went to war with the Feliciano family after they made a deal with the justice system.
edges.evidence_quote: Un tiempo después iniciaron una guerra con los antiguos socios de su padre, los Feliciano, debido a que esta familia hizo un acuerdo con la justicia para salirse del proyecto paramilitar.

descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of ACC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP, ELN , Bloque Centauros de las AUC

descriptions: ACC is listed as an enemy of AUC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP , ELN , Disidencias del EPL , ACC , Bloque Metro (Disidencia de AUC)

descriptions: The AUC's Bloque Centauros attacked the ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: El Bloque Centauros emprendería una serie de ataques en contra de un grupo paramilitar que militaba la zona, que era conocido por el nombre de Autodefensas Campesinas de Casanare (ACC).

descriptions: Bloque Centauros clashed with ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: the Centauros soon began clashing with a rival paramilitary group, the Peasant Self-Defense Forces of Casanare (ACC).

descriptions: Shining Path split from Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag.
edges.evidence_quote: Split from: Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag

descriptions: Shining Path split from the Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag.
edges.evidence_quote: It was an offshoot of the Peruvian Communist Party – Red Flag

descriptions: Fifteen MC was a feeder club for Outlaws in Finland.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws entered Finland via Russia, when a feeder club called Fifteen MC South Karelia was established in Lappeenranta in 2012 with support from a Russian Outlaws chapter.

descriptions: Spook Hunters attacked black youths, leading to formation of The Gladiators for self-defense.
edges.evidence_quote: In response to these white racist gangs, the black youths formed their own gangs to protect themselves and their neighborhoods: The Slausons, the Businessmen, and the Gladiators were all formed as a direct reaction to attacks from white gangs like the Spook Hunters.

descriptions: KNLP is a rival to KNPP.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals to the KNPP include the leftist Kayan New Land Party (KNLP)

Gate Keepers Motorcycle Club.description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2013 in Musquodoboit Harbour, Nova Scotia. Operates as a support club for the Hells Angels in Canada, with chapters in Ontario and formerly Nova Scotia. Known for rapid expansion and rivalry with Bacchus Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Darksiders chapter merged into Gate Keepers by patching over.
edges.evidence_quote: Bridgewater, Nova Scotia's Darksiders MC chapter patched over to become Gate Keepers

descriptions: Gatekeepers MC and Hells Angels attended the same funeral, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Hundreds of Hells Angels, Gatekeepers and several other support clubs arrived in London to show their support for Sinclair's funeral.

descriptions: Gate Keepers is a support club for Hells Angels, with sponsorship and pathway to membership.
edges.evidence_quote: It operates as a support club for the Hells Angels in Canada

descriptions: Red Devils is listed as an ally of Gate Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels, Red Devils Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Hells Angels formed alliances with Gate Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, the club has also formed alliances with various street gangs, including the Independent Soldiers, the Red Scorpions, the United Nations and the White Boy Posse, and smaller motorcycle gangs, such as Bacchus, the Gate Keepers and the Red Devils.

descriptions: Gate Keepers is a support club for Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Gate Keepers Motorcycle Club, a Hells Angels support club

Hard Livings.description: The Hard Livings gang is a large street gang and organized crime group based in Manenberg, Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1971 by twins Rashied and Rashaad Staggie, it evolved from a street gang into a structured criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, prostitution, contract killing, extortion, illegal diamond smuggling, and other crimes. The gang was one of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town, rivaling The Americans, and has international connections including with the Sicilian Mafia. After Rashaad was killed by vigilante group PAGAD in 1996, and Rashied in 2019, the gang remains active.

descriptions: PAGAD killed a leader of Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1996 Rashaad was publicly set alight and killed by the vigilante group PAGAD .

descriptions: Hard Livings cooperated with Sicilian Mafia in diamond and cannabis trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Internationally they have been known to have cooperated with the Sicilian mafia in the trafficking of illegal diamonds as well as trafficking cannabis to Europe.

descriptions: Hard Livings and The Americans are the two super gangs in Cape Town, implying rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hard Livings used to be one of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town with the other one being The Americans .

descriptions: Hard Livings competed with The Americans for drug distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang started out as a criminal street gang mostly involved in drug distribution for which they competed with the Americans gang.

descriptions: Hard Livings has associations with Varador Cortet.
edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.

descriptions: Hard Livings has associations with Westbury gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.

descriptions: Hard Livings is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings

descriptions: Hard Livings is a rival of The Americans per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hard Livings

descriptions: Bishnoi Gang killed a member of Khalistan Tiger Force.
edges.evidence_quote: Bishnoi's associates murdered Sukhdool Singh Gill, a member of the pro-Khalistani Khalistan Tiger Force, considered a terrorist organization by India.

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were allied with the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I "Chiofaliani" erano alleati della 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were also allied with the Bontempo Scavo faction of the Nebrodi mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: secondo il pentito Carmelo D'Amico anche della fazione dei "Bontempo Scavo" della mafia dei Nebrodi

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were allied with the Cursoti clan from Catania.
edges.evidence_quote: I "Chiofaliani" erano alleati della 'ndrangheta , del clan catanese dei Cursoti

descriptions: The Barcellonesi and Chiofaliani were in conflict, with many murders between them.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra fine anni '80 e gli anni '90, tra Barcellona , Terme Vigliatore , Mazzarrà , Novara di Sicilia e Falcone furono assassinate numerose vittime per ragioni di mafia e per contrasti tra il nuovo gruppo di Pino Chiofalo, ormai definitivamente separato da quello dei barcellonesi, e questi ultimi

descriptions: Sacco-Bocchetti-Lo Russo left the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo Sacco-Bocchetti-Lo Russo, uscito dall’ Alleanza di Secondigliano

'Ndrina Bonavota.description: The Bonavota are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Onofrio and Stefanaconi, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria. They have members in Piedmont (Turin, Carmagnola, Moncalieri) and Rome, and are allied with the Anello, Lo Bianco, and Mancuso clans. Their activities include extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and money laundering. They were involved in a bloody feud against the Petrolo-Bartolotta clans in the 1980s-1990s.

descriptions: Anello and Bonavota had joint commercial interests in Maierato and share territory in Pizzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato mentre a Pizzo l'area è suddivisa solo con i Bonavota

descriptions: Bonavota is a sub-unit of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Bonavota are allied with the Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Cracolici are a rival 'ndrina to the Bonavota, with members killed in 2002 and 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002 viene ucciso a Maierato Alfredo Cracolici e a Pizzo il 4 maggio 2004 Raffaele Cracolici, appartenenti ad una cosca rivale

descriptions: Rosario Fiaré of the Fiaré 'ndrina attempted to reconcile the Bonavota and Petrolo-Bartolotta.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosario Fiaré dell' omonima 'ndrina di San Gregorio d'Ippona , tentò di riappacificare i due fronti

descriptions: The Giampà refused to help the Cracolici against the Bonavota, indicating a non-hostile relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: i quali avrebbero chiesto aiuto ai Giampà , che non si sono resi disponibili in quanto non avrebbero voluto fare 'sgarbo' ai Bonavota

descriptions: The Bonavota are allied with the Lo Bianco.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Lo Bianco.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Mancuso intervened against the Bonavota in the feud, supplying weapons to the opposing faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella faida intervennero contro i Bonavota anche i Mancuso , i quali avrebbero fornito armi alla fazione opposta

descriptions: The Bonavota are allied with the Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Bonavota were involved in a bloody feud against the Petrolo-Bartolotta.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati coinvolti in una sanguinaria faida contro le cosche Petrolo-Bartolotta di Sant'Onofrio e Stefanaconi

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Commisso per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mancuso 'ndrina , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: The Cracolici and Bonavota are in conflict over control of Sant'Onofrio.
edges.evidence_quote: Dall'operazione Conquista del 2017 e conseguente omonimo processo del 2018 ancora in corso si registrano degli scontri con i Bonavota per il dominio di Sant'Onofrio.

descriptions: The Bonavota seek support from the Commisso against the Mancuso, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: altre meno potenti del vibonese come gli Anello , i Fiumara, gli Emanuele di Gerocarne , i Vallelunga , i Tassone, i Mantella, i Bonavota e i Piscopisani cercano appoggio nei Commisso

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Bonavota in the vibonese area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti nel vibonese con i Bonavota

descriptions: SSIA split from Noom Suk Harn.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1960, the movement suffered an internal split between the 'rough and uneducated' Saw Yanda and a group of young intellectuals, and the latter subsequently formed the Shan State Independence Army (SSIA).

descriptions: Los Chachos disputed drug corridors with Cártel del Golfo in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Una de las primeras misiones de Los Zetas fue erradicar a Los Chachos, un grupo de narcotraficantes a las órdenes del Cártel del Milenio, que disputaba los corredores de drogas de Tamaulipas con el Cartel del Golfo en 2003.

descriptions: Los Negros was formed from remnants of Los Chachos.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was originally formed from the remnants of the Los Chachos gang from Nuevo Laredo

descriptions: Los Chachos operated under the orders of Cártel del Milenio.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Chachos, un grupo de narcotraficantes a las órdenes del Cártel del Milenio

descriptions: Infobox lists Nusrat al-Islam as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Nusrat al-Islam

descriptions: The Alkhalil family and Duhre brothers have a long-standing feud.
time_periods: since the beginning of the century
edges.evidence_quote: A long-standing feud with the three Duhre brothers started at the beginning of the century.

descriptions: OFB members were linked to NPK in a murder case.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2020, SJ, alongside four others (Sheareem Cookhorn, Tyrell 'Trills' Graham, Shane 'Sneakz' Lyons, and Ojay 'O'Sav' Hamilton), was given a life sentence with a minimum of 21 years, following a court case at the Old Bailey for the murder of Kamali 'K1' Gabbidon-Lynck in Wood Green. The group was said to be linked to the NPK.

descriptions: Headie One and RV, prominent OFB members, were originally in Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: OFB was preceded by Star Gang, which was an offshoot from TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: OFB (Original Farm Boys) is the current gang associated with the Broadwater Farm Estate. They were preceded by Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s, an offshoot group from TMD which consisted of Headz (now known as Headie One) and Young RV (now known as RV), who later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB.

descriptions: Members of Star Gang formed part of OFB.
edges.evidence_quote: Two members of Star Gang, Headz (now known as Headie One ) and Young RV (now known as RV ), later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB (Original Farm Boys).

descriptions: Untouchables MC was an ally of Hells Angels that attacked Outlaws members.
edges.evidence_quote: Outlaws president Thore "Henki" Holm and a French Outlaws member were subsequently shot and wounded by a member of the Untouchables MC, a Hells Angels ally.

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with D'Onofrio in the Turin area.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... nel torinese con i Catalano e D'Onofrio
